# Chapter 7: Buildings, cities, urbanism  (~110 pp)
- 7.1 The building as engineered system (12) · 7.2 Urban systems: streets, blocks, neighbourhoods, districts, cities (15) · 7.3 Density, sprawl, and their engineering implications (15) · 7.4 Climate-resilient cities (15) · 7.5 Affordable-housing engineering (15) · 7.6 The city as institution: planning, zoning, governance (15) · 7.7 Failure section: housing crises, urban-renewal disasters, planning failures (23)

**Archetype**: scaling, ethics. **Project**: produce a 10-year plan for one specific neighbourhood, with engineering and political-economy analysis. **Exercises**: 25.
